labels.title: Address
labels.message: Shop No. 2, Ground Floor, Eminence -2, Village Punawale, Kate Wasti, Pimpari Chinchwad, PUNE PCMC ward No-001, Pune, Maharashtra-411033

tooltip.displayText: Kids Favourites Filter applied. Remove this filter to see the full Menu.

info.name: Dal Tadka Dhaba Style [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Dal cooked in Ghee, masalas & garlic + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Super comforting, super delicious!

info.name: Punjabi Kadhi Pakoda [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Tangy & creamy authentic Punjabi Kadhi Pakoda flavoured with masalas + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Savour the epic taste of Punjab!

info.name: Pind di Dal Makhani [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Dal Makhani cooked overnight in a rich cream-butter mix + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. The iconic taste of Punjab's Dal Makhani!

info.name: Ludhiana Subz Lababdar [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Seasonal vegetables & paneer simmered in a rich onion curry + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. An indulgent trip for your taste buds.

info.name: Punjabi Style Matar Paneer Steamed Rice Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Soft paneer cubes & tender matar cooked in an onion, tomato curry + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Special Punjabi tadka!

info.name: Jalandhari Mushroom Masala [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Fresh earthy mushrooms simmered  in a rich curry seasoned with punjabi masalas + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Wakhri Shaan from Jalandhar!

info.name: Dilliwala Paneer Makhani [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Chunks of paneer in a thick curry of cashews, rich butter & cream + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Memories of Purani Dilli gullies!

info.name: GT Road Paneer Mughlai [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Fresh paneer chunks in a delicious creamy curry + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Flavours of authentic North Indian tadka!

info.name: Kake Da Butter Chicken [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Soft & marinated chicken pieces in an utterly butterly cashew & tomato curry + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Punjab da swaad!

info.name: Homestyle Chicken [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Tender chicken pieces in a flavourful homestyle curry + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. A hearty bowl for the soul!

info.name: NH1 Chicken Tikka Masala [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Grilled chicken tikka in a flavour-packed tomato curry + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. Ready to get 'bowl'ed?

info.name: Patiala Chicken Mughlai [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Tender chicken pieces in a rich curry of onions & whole spices + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. A delight for chicken lovers!

info.name: ChorBazaar Mutton Curry [Steamed Rice] Bowl
info.description: [Serves 1] Comes in a bowl with Steamed Rice + Lip-smacking tender mutton packed in a rich flavourful curry + Green Chutney + Garlic Yogurt + Salad. So yummy, it's worth a steal!

info.name: Classic Chicken Masala Rice Bowl + 3 Mini Samosas
